description: A live hex status panel injected into opencode's right sidebar via the TUI plugin slot system

specs.description: Hex sidebar panel appears in opencode's right panel at startup
specs.given: hex chat is invoked and opencode.json is written with the plugin registered
specs.when: opencode launches and loads the hex-sidebar plugin
specs.then: A 'hex' section appears in the right panel between the context section (order 100) and the MCP section (order 200), at order 150

specs.description: Sidebar shows live project status: name, build hash, nexus connectivity
specs.given: hex-nexus is running and GET /api/status returns project metadata
specs.then: Displays project name, build hash (truncated to 8 chars), and a nexus connectivity indicator (connected/offline)

specs.description: Sidebar shows active swarms with task progress
specs.given: GET /api/hexflo/swarms returns at least one active swarm
specs.when: the sidebar renders the swarms section
specs.then: Each active swarm shows name and completed/total task count (e.g. '2/9 tasks'). Idle swarms are omitted.

specs.when: the sidebar renders the ADRs section
specs.then: Displays the 4 most recent ADRs with ID (truncated) and status label. Accepted shown in normal color, Deprecated dimmed.

specs.description: Sidebar shows registered inference providers with health indicators
specs.when: the sidebar renders the providers section
specs.then: Each provider shows name and a live/offline indicator. At most 3 providers shown to fit the 42-char panel width.

specs.given: The sidebar plugin is loaded and opencode is active
specs.when: 30 seconds elapse since the last fetch
specs.then: All data sections are re-fetched from hex-nexus and the display updates

specs.description: Sidebar shows 'nexus offline' gracefully when nexus is unreachable
specs.then: A single 'nexus offline' message is shown instead of crashing or showing empty sections. opencode continues to work normally.

specs.description: Sidebar content fits within the 42-character panel width
specs.given: A project name longer than 30 characters or a swarm name that would overflow
specs.then: All text is truncated with '…' to fit within 38 chars (leaving 2-char padding each side)

specs.description: Plugin file and opencode.json plugin registration are written by hex chat
specs.given: hex chat is invoked in a project directory
specs.then: .opencode/plugins/hex-sidebar.tsx is written to CWD with the nexus URL templated in, and opencode.json includes plugin: [['./plugins/hex-sidebar.tsx']]

specs.description: Plugin only fetches from the configured nexus URL — no external URLs
specs.given: The nexus URL is injected at write time from the trusted NexusClient config
specs.then: All fetch() calls use the hardcoded nexus URL from the template — no user-supplied URLs, no external network calls
